query:
SELECT 
  c.name as categoria,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.phone IS NOT NULL AND e.phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_telefone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.hours IS NOT NULL AND e.hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.lat IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_coordenadas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_instagram
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  c.name as categoria,
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.phone IS NOT NULL AND e.phone != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_telefone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.hours IS NOT NULL AND e.hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.rating IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.lat IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_coordenadas,
  SUM(CASE WHEN e.instagram IS NOT NULL AND e.instagram != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_instagram
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON e.categoryId = c.id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) ASC;
